Barbaracle - Fighting - 130 HP

Pokémon - Stage 1 - Evolves from Binacle

Ability: Stone Arms

Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Attach a Basic [F] Energy card from your hand to 1 of your [F] Pokémon.

FFC Hammer In 80

Weakness: Grass
Resistance: none
Retreat: 2
